历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 5096, in 2024 approximately 4824, and in 2025 approximately 4591. Over the past three years, the ranking has been moving forward (decreasing numbers), with a cumulative forward shift of about 505, indicating intensifying competition year by year. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4591. The university's science enrollment plan in Xinjiang was 120 in 2023, 120 in 2024, 122 in 2025, and is planned to be 115 in 2026, a reduction of 7 students (about 5.7%) compared to 2025. The reduction in enrollment slots further intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 63rd in 2025 and rose to 57th in 2026, showing a steady improvement in ranking, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2024, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, overall stable. The university's Douyin (TikTok) popularity ranking is 7th overall (high heat), with high attention on short video platforms, reflecting rising application enthusiasm. It has three A- or above disciplines: Chemical Engineering and Technology (A), Chemistry (A-), and Materials Science and Engineering (A-), with outstanding strength in chemical engineering and materials, highly aligned with the university's science and engineering characteristics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended by society, benefiting science and engineering universities. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination students in Xinjiang in 2026 is approximately 238,000, a significant increase from 2025. Based on historical proportions, it is estimated that there are about 163,000 science students (only 52,500 in 2025). The surge in the number of examinees significantly intensifies competition. The university is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, which has a strong regional appeal to Xinjiang students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the continuous forward shift of historical rankings, the reduction of 7 science enrollment slots in 2026, the improvement in Soft Science ranking and increased attention from Douyin's high heat, and the substantial increase in the total number of Xinjiang examinees, the signal of intensified competition is clear. Based on the 2025 baseline of 4591, with minor adjustments due to the university's improved level and the surge in examinee numbers, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 4383, with a range of 3883–4883.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 4383, range 3883–4883. For rankings in the middle of the range (approximately 4300–4500), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as a safety. For rankings better than the lower limit of the range (within approximately 3900), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Hongde Academy, dual degree programs). For rankings near the upper limit of the range (outside approximately 4800), it is recommended to focus on Tier 3 safety majors and be cautious with popular majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 1290, in 2024 approximately 1215, and in 2025 approximately 1104. Over the past three years, the ranking has consistently moved forward (decreasing numbers), with a cumulative forward shift of about 186, indicating gradually intensifying competition. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1104. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts in Xinjiang was 6 students in 2023, 6 in 2024, 4 in 2025, and 12 in 2026, a significant expansion of 8 students (200% increase) compared to 2025, which markedly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2025 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranked 63rd, rising to 57th in 2026, showing steady improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition. The reputation evaluation for 2024 is neutral/mixed, overall stable. The university's overall popularity on Douyin ranks 7th (high heat), with high attention on short video platforms, reflecting rising application enthusiasm. Chemical Engineering and Technology (A), Chemistry (A-), Materials Science and Engineering (A-), primarily science and engineering, with no direct A-class discipline support for liberal arts majors, but the overall improvement of the university also drives liberal arts.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of liberal arts majors such as Business Administration and Law is mixed and wait-and-see. The total number of ordinary college entrance exam candidates in Xinjiang in 2026 is approximately 238,000, a significant increase from 2025. Based on historical proportions, the estimated number of liberal arts candidates is about 75,000 (only 24,000 in 2025), causing a sharp increase in competition. The university is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, which has strong regional appeal to Xinjiang candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the 200% expansion of liberal arts enrollment in 2026, the improvement in Soft Science ranking and increased attention from Douyin heat, and the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Xinjiang, the positive effect of enrollment expansion and the negative effect of candidate surge offset each other. Based on the 2025 baseline of 1104, with minor adjustments for the surge in candidate numbers and the improvement in university level, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 2349, with a range of 1926–2772.
